suites_failed_detail: stripe-webhook-idempotency.test.js: Cannot find module checkoutProduction (BROKEN by d922de6 checkout unification)
webhook.test.js: 5 failures — tests written against old checkout.js structure, need updating for unified checkout
checkout-price-validation.test.js: 4 failures — tests expect old response shape after checkout unification
downloadRoutes.test.js: pre-existing 'exists is not a function' error
storeBuilder.test.js: 3 failures returning 500 — pre-existing, newly discovered by Jest roots fix (bd7d83f)

findings.worker_claim: Unified checkout.js and checkoutProduction.js into single route file. All features merged. server.js updated to unconditionally require checkout. checkoutProduction.js deleted.
findings.evidence: Code change matches claim: checkout.js expanded (+388/-704 lines), checkoutProduction.js deleted, server.js simplified from conditional require to direct require. Real unification with all claimed features (stripeHealthService, courseSlug, IPFS, rate limiter, payment_intent_data, idempotent webhooks, etc). However, 3 test suites now broken: stripe-webhook-idempotency.test.js imports deleted checkoutProduction.js, and webhook.test.js + checkout-price-validation.test.js fail due to changed checkout structure. Worker did not update dependent tests.
findings.fix_needed: Update stripe-webhook-idempotency.test.js to import checkout.js instead of checkoutProduction.js. Update webhook.test.js and checkout-price-validation.test.js mocks/assertions for unified checkout structure.

findings.worker_claim: Changed crossOriginEmbedderPolicy: false to { policy: 'credentialless' } in Helmet config. Restores browser-level Spectre isolation while remaining Stripe.js-compatible.
findings.evidence: 1-line change in server.js exactly as claimed: `crossOriginEmbedderPolicy: false` replaced with `crossOriginEmbedderPolicy: { policy: 'credentialless' }`. Comment documents Chrome 96+/Firefox 119+ compatibility. No stubs, no TODOs.

findings.worker_claim: Added marketplace/backend/__tests__ to Jest roots in package.json. All 21 federation/network tests now discovered and pass.
findings.evidence: 1-line addition to package.json Jest roots config: added `<rootDir>/marketplace/backend/__tests__`. Correct fix. Side effect: also discovered pre-existing storeBuilder.test.js failures (3 tests returning 500), but that's a pre-existing issue, not caused by this change.

findings.worker_claim: Changed const EmailService = require(...) + new EmailService() to const emailService = require(...). Fixes TypeError crash.
findings.evidence: Diff confirms: removed `const EmailService = require(...)` and `const emailService = new EmailService()`, replaced with `const emailService = require(...)`. Correct fix — emailService.js exports a singleton instance. This was a P0 crash bug correctly resolved.

new_tasks.title: Fix test suites broken by checkout unification
new_tasks.description: d922de6 deleted checkoutProduction.js but 3 test suites still reference it or depend on old checkout.js structure: (1) stripe-webhook-idempotency.test.js line 70 requires checkoutProduction — change to checkout.js. (2) webhook.test.js has 5 failing tests due to changed webhook handler structure. (3) checkout-price-validation.test.js has 4 failing tests due to changed create-session response shape (now returns orderId, different Stripe session params).

new_tasks.title: Fix pre-existing storeBuilder.test.js failures
new_tasks.description: 3 intake tests return 500 instead of 201. Likely missing DB table setup in test beforeAll or route initialization issue. Newly discovered by Jest roots fix (bd7d83f).

context.summary: 4 tasks reviewed across 4 commits (a861981..d922de6). 3 VERIFIED, 1 PARTIAL. The checkout unification (060-P3) is a correct refactor but broke 3 test suites that still reference the deleted checkoutProduction.js or depend on old checkout.js structure — 10 test failures directly attributable. The COEP fix, Jest roots fix, and emailService singleton fix are all clean, correct implementations. 2 new fix tasks created. Test suite: 202/215 passing (13 failures: 10 from checkout unification, 3 pre-existing storeBuilder).
